hero.description: ਸਾਡੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਮੀਅਮ ਮਸਾਲਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਭਾਰਤ ਦੇ ਅਸਲੀ ਸੁਆਦ ਦਾ ਅਨੁਭਵ ਕਰੋ। ਪਿਆਰ ਨਾਲ ਬਣਾਏ, ਸੰਭਾਲ ਨਾਲ ਪਹੁੰਚਾਏ।

items.name: ਪ੍ਰਿਯਾ ਸ਼ਰਮਾ
items.review: ਮਸਾਲਿਆਂ ਦੀ ਗੁਣਵੱਤਾ ਲਾਜਵਾਬ ਹੈ! ਹੁਣ ਮੇਰੇ ਪਕਵਾਨ ਕਿਤੇ ਜ਼ਿਆਦਾ ਸੁਆਦੀ ਲੱਗਦੇ ਹਨ।

items.name: ਰਾਜੇਸ਼ ਕੁਮਾਰ
items.review: ਅਸਲੀ ਸੁਆਦ ਅਤੇ ਵਧੀਆ ਪੈਕੇਜਿੰਗ। ਜ਼ਰੂਰ ਸਿਫ਼ਾਰਸ਼ ਕਰਦਾ ਹਾਂ!

items.name: ਅਨੀਤਾ ਪਟੇਲ
items.review: ਹੁਣ ਤੱਕ ਦੇ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਵਧੀਆ ਮਸਾਲੇ। ਦੁਬਾਰਾ ਜ਼ਰੂਰ ਆਰਡਰ ਕਰਾਂਗੀ!

cta.title: ਆਪਣੀ ਰਸੋਈ ਵਿੱਚ ਸੁਆਦ ਭਰਨ ਲਈ ਤਿਆਰ ਹੋ?
cta.subtitle: ਸਾਡੇ ਹੱਥਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਬਣੇ ਮਸਾਲਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਭਾਰਤੀ ਪਰੰਪਰਾ ਦਾ ਅਸਲੀ ਸਾਰ ਮਾਣੋ। ਸ਼ੁੱਧ, ਅਸਲੀ, ਅਤੇ ਤੁਹਾਡੇ ਘਰ ਤੱਕ ਪਹੁੰਚਾਇਆ।

auth.subtitle: ਆਪਣੇ ਖਾਤੇ ਤੱਕ ਪਹੁੰਚਣ ਲਈ ਆਪਣੇ ਵੇਰਵੇ ਦਾਖਲ ਕਰੋ

about.heroSubtitle: ਬੜਨਗਰ ਦੀ ਇੱਕ ਛੋਟੀ ਪਰਿਵਾਰਕ ਰਸੋਈ ਤੋਂ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਲੱਖਾਂ ਖਾਣੇ ਦੀਆਂ ਮੇਜ਼ਾਂ ਤੱਕ — ਇਹ ਨਿਧੀ ਮਸਾਲਾ ਦਾ ਸਫ਼ਰ ਹੈ, ਇੱਕ-ਇੱਕ ਪਰੰਪਰਾ ਨੂੰ ਪੀਸਦੇ ਹੋਏ।
about.beginTitle: ਪੀੜ੍ਹੀ-ਦਰ-ਪੀੜ੍ਹੀ ਚੱਲੀ ਰੈਸਿਪੀ, ਕਦੇ ਲਿਖੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਗਈ
about.beginP1: ਸ਼ੁਰੂਆਤ ਇੱਕ ਸਧਾਰਨ ਵਿਸ਼ਵਾਸ ਨਾਲ ਹੋਈ — ਕਿ ਭਾਰਤੀ ਖਾਣੇ ਦੀ ਆਤਮਾ ਉਸ ਦੇ ਮਸਾਲਿਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਵੱਸਦੀ ਹੈ। ਜੋ ਪਰਿਵਾਰ ਅਤੇ ਗੁਆਂਢੀਆਂ ਲਈ ਹੱਥਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਪੀਸੇ ਮਸਾਲਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਹੋਇਆ, ਉਹ ਹੌਲੀ-ਹੌਲੀ ਪੂਰੇ ਖੇਤਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਭਰੋਸੇ ਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਬਣ ਗਿਆ।
about.beginP2: ਹਰ ਮੌਸਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਅਸੀਂ ਇੱਕ ਵਾਅਦਾ ਨਿਭਾਇਆ: ਖੇਤ ਤੋਂ ਰਸੋਈ ਤੱਕ ਅਸਲੀਅਤ, ਵਿਚਕਾਰ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਨਕਲੀ ਨਹੀਂ।

timeline.title: ਇੱਕ ਨਿਮਰ ਸ਼ੁਰੂਆਤ
timeline.text: ਨਿਧੀ ਗ੍ਰਹਿ ਉਦਯੋਗ ਦੀ ਸ਼ੁਰੂਆਤ ਬੜਨਗਰ ਦੀ ਇੱਕ ਛੋਟੀ ਪਰਿਵਾਰਕ ਰਸੋਈ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੋਈ, ਜਿੱਥੇ ਦਾਦੀ-ਨਾਨੀ ਵਾਂਗ ਹੱਥਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਮਸਾਲੇ ਪੀਸੇ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਸਨ।

timeline.title: ਜੜ੍ਹਾਂ ਮਜ਼ਬੂਤ ਹੋਈਆਂ
timeline.text: ਸਾਡੀ ਖੁਸ਼ਬੂ ਦੀ ਚਰਚਾ ਪੂਰੇ ਉੱਜੈਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਫੈਲ ਗਈ। ਅਸੀਂ ਬਿਹਤਰੀਨ ਫ਼ਸਲ ਲਈ ਸਿੱਧੇ ਸਥਾਨਕ ਕਿਸਾਨਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਭਾਈਵਾਲੀ ਕੀਤੀ।

timeline.title: ਰਸੋਈ ਤੋਂ ਉਦਯੋਗ ਤੱਕ
timeline.text: ਅਸੀਂ ਆਪਣੀ ਪ੍ਰੋਸੈਸਿੰਗ ਨੂੰ ਆਧੁਨਿਕ ਬਣਾਇਆ, ਨਾਲ ਹੀ ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਰਵਾਇਤੀ ਰੈਸਿਪੀਆਂ ਦੀ ਪੂਰੀ ਰਾਖੀ ਕੀਤੀ ਜੋ ਸਾਡੀ ਪਛਾਣ ਹਨ।

timeline.title: ਲੱਖਾਂ ਰਸੋਈਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ
timeline.text: ਦਸ ਲੱਖ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਧ ਪਰਿਵਾਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਰੋਜ਼ ਦੇ ਖਾਣੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਅਸਲੀ ਸੁਆਦ ਲਈ ਨਿਧੀ ਮਸਾਲਾ 'ਤੇ ਭਰੋਸਾ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ।

process.title: ਖੇਤਾਂ ਤੋਂ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ
process.text: ਭਰੋਸੇਮੰਦ ਸਥਾਨਕ ਕਿਸਾਨਾਂ ਤੋਂ ਸਿੱਧੇ ਹੱਥਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਚੁਣੀ ਫ਼ਸਲ।

process.title: ਮੱਠੀ ਅੱਗ 'ਤੇ ਭੁੰਨਿਆ
process.text: ਤੇਲ ਅਤੇ ਖੁਸ਼ਬੂ ਬਣਾਈ ਰੱਖਣ ਲਈ ਛੋਟੇ ਬੈਚਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਭੁੰਨਿਆ।

process.title: ਚੱਕੀ 'ਤੇ ਪੀਸਿਆ
process.text: ਕੁਦਰਤੀ ਸੁਆਦ ਦੀ ਹਰ ਛੋਹ ਬਚਾਉਣ ਲਈ ਬਾਰੀਕ ਪੀਸਿਆ।

process.title: ਤਾਜ਼ਾ ਸੀਲ ਕੀਤਾ
process.text: ਏਅਰਟਾਈਟ ਪੈਕ, ਤਾਂ ਜੋ ਪਹਿਲੀ ਚੁਟਕੀ ਆਖ਼ਰੀ ਵਰਗੀ ਹੀ ਲੱਗੇ।

values.title: ਗੁਣਵੱਤਾ ਸਰਬਉੱਚ
values.description: ਅਸੀਂ ਆਪਣੇ ਉਤਪਾਦਾਂ ਦੀ ਗੁਣਵੱਤਾ ਨਾਲ ਕਦੇ ਸਮਝੌਤਾ ਨਹੀਂ ਕਰਦੇ।

values.title: ਗਾਹਕ ਕੇਂਦਰਿਤ
values.description: ਤੁਹਾਡੀ ਸੰਤੁਸ਼ਟੀ ਹਮੇਸ਼ਾ ਸਾਡੀ ਸਰਬਉੱਚ ਤਰਜੀਹ ਹੈ।

values.title: ਪਿਆਰ ਨਾਲ ਬਣਿਆ
values.description: ਹਰ ਉਤਪਾਦ ਦੇਖਭਾਲ ਅਤੇ ਜਨੂਨ ਨਾਲ ਤਿਆਰ ਕੀਤਾ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

values.title: 100% ਕੁਦਰਤੀ
values.description: ਸ਼ੁੱਧ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ, ਕੋਈ ਨਕਲੀ ਮਿਲਾਵਟ ਨਹੀਂ।

about.ctaTitle: ਆਪਣੀ ਰਸੋਈ ਨੂੰ ਸਾਡੀ ਕਹਾਣੀ ਵਿੱਚ ਜੋੜੋ
about.ctaSubtitle: ਉਹ ਹੱਥਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਬਣੇ ਮਸਾਲੇ ਲੱਭੋ ਜੋ ਉਸੇ ਤਰ੍ਹਾਂ ਬਣੇ ਹਨ ਜਿਵੇਂ ਹਮੇਸ਼ਾ ਬਣਨੇ ਚਾਹੀਦੇ ਸਨ।

ourStory.label: Our Story
ourStory.heading: Authentic Indian Flavors
ourStory.body: Experience the rich heritage of traditional Indian spices, carefully sourced and blended to perfection. Each product tells a story of generations of expertise and passion for authentic flavors.

combo.defaultStory: A ready-made kit of {{count}} kitchen essentials.
combo.defaultStorySavings: A ready-made kit of {{count}} kitchen essentials, bundled to save you ₹{{amount}} versus buying them one by one.
combo.comboSubtitle: Save more with our value bundles
combo.saveTogether: Save more when you buy together

offerZone.heroSubtitle: Amazing deals and discounts on premium spices and masalas
offerZone.comboOffersSubtitle: Save more with our value bundles
offerZone.noOffers: No offers available at the moment.
offerZone.checkBack: Check back soon for amazing deals!

search.noResults: No products found matching your search

areas.title: Shipping Areas
areas.body: We currently ship to all locations within India. Unfortunately, we do not ship internationally at this time.

charges.title: Shipping Charges
charges.intro: Shipping charges are calculated based on the weight of your order and delivery location:
charges.upto: Orders up to ₹500: ₹50 shipping charge applies

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.body: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email and SMS. You can track your order using this number on the courier partner's website, or check its status on the My Orders page.

processing.title: Order Processing
processing.body: Orders are processed within 24-48 hours of receiving payment confirmation. Orders placed on weekends or holidays will be processed on the next business day.

attempts.title: Delivery Attempts
attempts.body: Our courier partner will make 3 delivery attempts. If all attempts fail, the order will be returned to us. Please ensure someone is available to receive the order at the provided address.

address.title: Shipping Address
address.body1: The customer is responsible for providing a complete and correct shipping address at the time of placing the order. We are not liable for orders lost, delayed or returned due to a wrong or incomplete address, and no refund will be issued in such cases.
address.body2: If you need to change your address, contact us on WhatsApp at +91 93000 05040 within 1 hour of placing the order. Address changes requested after this window cannot be guaranteed, as the order may already be processed for dispatch.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: For any shipping-related queries, please contact our customer support at +91 93000 05040 or email us through our contact page.

eligibility.title: Return & Replacement Eligibility
eligibility.intro: We accept return or replacement requests within 7 days of delivery for the following reasons only:
items: Product received is damaged or defective
Wrong product delivered
Product packaging is tampered or broken
Missing items from your order

video.title: Unboxing Video Required
video.intro: An unboxing video is mandatory for every return or replacement request. Without it, we will not be able to accept your claim.
items: Record a single, continuous video starting before the sealed package is opened
The shipping label and packaging condition must be clearly visible
Show all items as they are taken out, including the damaged, wrong or missing item issue
Videos that are cut, edited or start after the package is already open will not be accepted

nonReturnable.title: Non-Returnable Items
nonReturnable.intro: Due to hygiene and quality reasons, the following cannot be returned:
items: Products with broken seals or opened packaging (unless damaged on arrival)
Products that have been used or consumed
Change of mind — food products cannot be returned once delivered

process.title: Return Process
items: Contact our customer support within 7 days of delivery
Provide your order number, the reason for return and your unboxing video
Our team will verify your request within 24-48 hours
Once approved, we'll arrange a pickup from your address
Product must be returned in original packaging

refund.title: Refund Process
refund.intro: Once we receive and inspect the returned product:
items: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days
Amount will be credited to the original payment method
You will receive a confirmation once the refund is processed

replacement.title: Replacement Policy
replacement.body: We offer replacements for damaged or defective items, subject to the unboxing video requirement above. The replacement product will be shipped at no additional cost once we receive the returned item.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.body: Orders cannot be cancelled once placed. Please review your items, quantities and address carefully before completing your purchase.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.body: For any return or refund queries, please contact our customer support at +91 93000 05040 or email us through our contact page. Our team is available Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 6 PM IST.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of this website and the purchase of products from <brand>Nidhi Grah Udyog</brand> ("we", "us", "our"). By browsing the website, creating an account, or placing an order, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the website.

s1.title: 1. Eligibility
s1.body: You must be at least 18 years of age, or accessing the website under the supervision of a parent or legal guardian, and legally capable of entering into a binding contract under applicable Indian law to place an order with us.

s2.title: 2. Account & Registration
items: You are responsible for providing accurate, current and complete information during registration and checkout.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account.
We may suspend or terminate accounts that we reasonably believe are being used fraudulently or in breach of these Terms.

s3.title: 3. Products & Food Information
items: We sell packaged food products such as spices, masala blends and papad. Product images are for representation; actual colour, texture and packaging may vary slightly.
Please read the label, ingredients, allergen information and "best before" date on the physical packaging before consumption.
If you have food allergies or dietary restrictions, consume our products at your discretion. We are not liable for reactions where label instructions were not followed.

s4.title: 4. Pricing & Payment
items: All prices are listed in Indian Rupees (₹) and are inclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise. GST is charged as per applicable rates.
Shipping charges, where applicable, are shown at checkout before you confirm your order.
In the rare event of a pricing error, we reserve the right to cancel the order and refund any amount already paid.
Payments are accepted via the methods displayed at checkout. Your order is confirmed only after we verify successful receipt of payment.

s5.title: 5. Orders & Acceptance
s5.body: Your order is an offer to purchase. We reserve the right to accept or decline any order at our discretion, including where the product is out of stock, the delivery address is outside our serviceable area, or we suspect fraud. Where an order is declined after payment, the amount will be refunded.

s6.title: 6. Shipping, Returns & Cancellations
s6.body: Delivery timelines, shipping charges, returns, refunds and cancellations are governed by our <shipping>Shipping Policy</shipping> and <returns>Return & Refund Policy</returns>, which form part of these Terms.

s7.title: 7. Intellectual Property
s7.body: All content on this website — including logos, brand names, text, graphics, images and design — is the property of <brand>Nidhi Grah Udyog</brand> or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not copy, reproduce or use it without our prior written permission.

s8.title: 8. Acceptable Use
s8.body: You agree not to use the website for any unlawful purpose, attempt to gain unauthorised access to our systems, upload malicious code, scrape data at scale, or interfere with the normal operation of the website.

s9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
s9.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, our total liability for any claim arising out of an order shall not exceed the amount paid by you for that order. We are not liable for indirect or consequential losses. Nothing in these Terms limits any rights you have under the Consumer Protection Act, 2019.

s10.title: 10. Governing Law & Jurisdiction
s10.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts at Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh.

s11.title: 11. Changes to These Terms
s11.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. The revised version will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. Continued use of the website after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

s12.title: 12. Contact Us
s12.body: For any questions about these Terms, contact us at <phone>+91 93000 05040</phone> or through our <contact>Contact page</contact>.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how <brand>Nidhi Grah Udyog</brand> (Proprietor: Lalit Kumar Jain) ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, shares and protects your personal data when you use this website. We are committed to handling your data in accordance with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act) and applicable Indian law. By using the website, you agree to this Policy.

s1.title: 1. Data We Collect
s1.item1: Account & order details: name, email, phone number, shipping address and order history.
s1.item2: Payment information: we do not store your full payment credentials; UPI/payments are handled by the payment provider.
s1.item3: Usage & device data: pages viewed, products browsed and approximate (coarse) location, used to improve the site and recommendations.

s2.title: 2. Purpose & Legal Basis
s2.body: We process your personal data for specified, lawful purposes: to process and deliver your orders, provide customer support, personalise recommendations, run anonymous aggregate analytics, send order updates, and (with your consent) promotional communication. We rely on your consent and on the necessity of processing to fulfil the services you request.

s3.title: 3. Consent
s3.body: You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us. Withdrawing consent will not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal, and may limit our ability to provide certain services.

s4.title: 4. Sharing of Data
s4.body: We share your data only with trusted service providers (courier/logistics partners, payment processors, hosting/analytics providers) to the extent necessary to operate the service. We do not sell your personal data. We may disclose data where required by law.

s5.title: 5. Cookies & Analytics
s5.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to keep you logged in, remember your cart, and understand how the website is used through anonymous, aggregate analytics. You can control cookies through your browser settings and the on-site cookie notice.

s6.title: 6. Data Security & Retention
s6.body: We use reasonable technical and organisational safeguards to protect your data. We retain personal data only as long as necessary to provide our services and to meet legal, accounting and tax obligations.

s7.title: 7. Your Rights (DPDP Act, 2023)
s7.body: You have the right to access, correct, update and erase your personal data, to nominate, and to grievance redressal. To exercise any right, contact us using the details below.

s8.title: 8. Grievance Officer
s8.body:
Ankur Jain • +91 93000 05040
We acknowledge grievances within 48 hours and aim to resolve them within 30 days.

s9.title: 9. Contact Us
s9.body: <brand>Nidhi Grah Udyog</brand>, 7, Industrial Area, Runija Road, Barnagar, Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh 456771. Email <email>nidhigrahudyog@rediffmail.com</email> or call <phone>+91 93000 05040</phone>, or use our <contact>Contact page</contact>.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about ordering, delivery and returns.
faq.still: Still have a question? Contact our team.

items.q: Which areas do you deliver to?
items.a: We currently ship to all locations across India. We do not offer international shipping at this time.
Orders are processed within 24–48 hours of payment confirmation. Delivery usually takes 3–5 business days in metro cities, 5–7 days in other cities, and 7–10 days for remote areas.
Shipping is free on orders above ₹500. For orders below ₹500, a nominal shipping charge is applied and shown at checkout before you pay.

items.q: How do I track my order?
items.a: Once your order ships, you will receive a tracking number by email/SMS. You can also view order status any time under 'My Orders'.

items.q: How do I download my bill / invoice?
items.a: Go to 'My Orders', open the relevant order and click 'Bill' to download a GST tax invoice as a PDF.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept UPI payments. The accepted methods are shown at checkout. Your order is confirmed once we verify successful receipt of payment.
Yes. Orders can be cancelled free of charge within 24 hours of placing them, provided they have not yet been shipped. See our Return & Refund Policy for details.

items.q: What is your return and refund policy?
items.a: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery for damaged, defective, wrong or missing items. Approved refunds are processed to your original payment method within 5–7 business days. For hygiene reasons, opened or consumed food products cannot be returned unless they arrived damaged.

items.q: Are your products fresh and how should I store them?
items.a: Yes — our spices and papad are packed fresh. Please check the 'best before' date on the packaging and store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and moisture.

items.q: How can I contact customer support?
items.a: You can reach us at +91 93000 05040 (Monday–Saturday, 9 AM–6 PM IST) or through our Contact page. You can also chat with us via the assistant on the website.
